reviews.comment:
Impecable. Excelente atención de todo el personal. Amabilidad y respeto destacables! Cabe mencionar especialmente la accesibilidad para discapacitados en las instalaciones sanitarias; y hay una persona de limpieza permanente en los baños. Como.corresponde. Excelente!

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable. Excellent service from all the staff. Their kindness and respect were outstanding! Special mention should be made of the accessibility for people with disabilities in the restrooms; and there is a cleaning person on duty at all times. As it should be. Excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2c2ZpQTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vine el sábado a la madrugada. Solo dos empleados en los surtidores. Más de media hora de cola. La verdad una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
I came early Saturday morning. Only two employees at the pumps. More than half an hour's wait. It's a disgrace.

reviews.comment:
En esta gasolinera da placer cargar nafta. Es hermoso el lugar , esta ubicado en la parte baja de un gran edificio , teniendo que conducir literalmente por debajo el edificio, donde te da la sensación que siempre te esperan y reciben . La confitería cafetería da gusto , siempre son atentos . El baño limpio . Buenos descuentos si tienes club ACA , que por cierto es muy recomendable este seguro de auto .

(Translated by Google)
Filling up at this gas station is a pleasure. The place is beautiful, located on the lower level of a large building, requiring you to drive right through it, giving you the feeling that you're always being welcomed and expected. The café is delightful, and the staff is always attentive. The restroom is clean. There are good discounts if you have an ACA club membership, which, by the way, is a highly recommended car insurance policy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2b3IyOURREAE
